question.content: For the transistor circuit with beta=120, rbe=3 kOhm, and UBEQ=0.7 V, determine key quiescent values and dynamic parameters. Output exactly seven comma-separated values in the order UBQ_V,ICQ_mA,IBQ_uA,UCEQ_V,Au,Ri_ohm,Ro_kOhm, plain ASCII only, no Chinese characters, no unit text, no percent sign, no fraction, no equation form, and no extra text.

step_1.content: Use bias-network approximation for UBQ and compute ICQ, IBQ, and UCEQ from DC equations.

step_3.content: Analyze panel 1 of 3 and record the intermediate relation needed before moving to the next panel.
step_3.key_point: Set up the governing relation for key quiescent values and dynamic parameters.

step_5.content: Analyze panel 2 of 3 and record the intermediate relation needed before moving to the next panel.
step_5.key_point: Transform the relation and isolate key quiescent values and dynamic parameters.

step_7.content: Compute Au, Ri, Ro from the AC equivalent circuit and output in order.
step_7.key_point: Au, Ri, Ro from the AC equivalent circuit.
